task_objective: Rename the project to game-install-finder and prepare GitHub Actions PyPI publishing metadata.
design_decisions: Renamed the PyPI distribution, import package, CLI command, and cache root to game-install-finder naming.
Kept Steam as the only implemented launcher while documenting Heroic and Lutris as future direction.
Configured PyPI Trusted Publishing through GitHub Actions using uv build --no-sources and uv publish.
results: Merged feat-cli-entrypoint into main before the rename.
Added failing tests for the new project metadata, import package, cache root, README wording, and publish workflow.
Renamed src/game_path_finder to src/game_install_finder and moved the CLI implementation to cli.py.
Validated with ruff, ty, pytest, and uv build --no-sources before commit.
